series_metadata.series_title: Section 5303, 5304 and 5305 Metropolitan and Statewide Planning Programs
series_metadata.series_description: Grant applications, rejected grant applications, contracts, invoices, and correspondence pertaining to ODOT''s Metropolitan and Statewide Planning Program.
